architect.description: High-level design and ADR maintenance. Translates complex requirements into actionable technical plans.

engineer.description: Core developer. Executes code changes, refactoring, and feature implementation delegated by the Lead.

lead.description: Orchestrator and task delegator. Decomposes high-level goals into sub-tasks for specialized agents using the nb task board.

researcher.description: Information gathering and documentation. Monitors the ecosystem and maintains the knowledge base.

security.description: Compliance and security gatekeeper. Audits all code changes and sandbox constraints.

tester.description: Test automation and verification. Ensures 100% pass rate and reports regressions.
